revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:延暦儀式帳]][[zh:延历仪式帐]]
'''Enryaku Gishiki-chō''' (延暦儀式帳) is a collective term for two ritual texts related to {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|qid=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine|1=Ise Grand Shrine}}: the {{ill|Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Kōtaijingū Gishiki-chō|ja|皇太神宮儀式帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtaijingū Gishiki-chō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延暦儀式帳}}, which pertains to the {{ill|Kōtaijingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtaijingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Inner Shrine), and the {{ill|Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Tōyukegū Gishiki-chō|ja|止由気宮儀式帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōyukegū Gishiki-chō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延暦儀式帳}}, which pertains to the {{ill|Tōyukegū|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyōke Daijingū|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōyukegū|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyōke Daijingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (Outer Shrine). Compiled during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}, these texts are the oldest surviving records related to Ise Grand Shrine.<ref name=";3">{{Cite |title=延暦儀式帳とは - コトバンク|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/延暦儀式帳-216370|accessdate=2021-08-16}}</ref> The compilation of these texts was initiated under the command of Emperor Kanmu, who held deep reverence for Ise Grand Shrine.<ref name="神社本庁監修『神社のいろは 続』扶桑社(2013),56頁">神社本庁監修『神社のいろは 続』扶桑社(2013),56頁</ref> The texts were authored by shrine priests ({{ill|Negi|ja|禰宜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Negi|1=Negi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11594490}}) and court officials from both the Inner and Outer Shrines.<ref name=";3"/> After being submitted to the {{ill|Department of Divinities|en|Department of Divinities|qid=Q2264720|lt=Department of Divinities|1=Department of Divinities}} and subsequently to the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|qid=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}}, the texts were finalized in 804 (Enryaku 23).<ref name="國學院大學日本文化研究所編『神道事典』弘文堂(1999),571頁">國學院大學日本文化研究所編『神道事典』弘文堂(1999),571頁</ref> These documents provide details on the scale of the shrines, annual rituals, extraordinary ceremonies such as {{ill|Sengū|en|Sengū|qid=Q2271023|lt=Sengū|1=Sengū}}, and other aspects of shrine management, as well as ceremonies not documented in later texts like the {{ill|Engishiki|en|Engishiki|qid=Q1342448|lt=Engishiki|1=Engishiki}}. As such, they are invaluable for understanding early Heian period rituals and practices at Ise Grand Shrine.<ref name="國學院大學日本文化研究所編『神道事典』弘文堂(1999),571頁"/>. == Kōtaijingū Gishiki-chō == The {{ill|Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Kōtaijingū Gishiki-chō|ja|皇太神宮儀式帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtaijingū Gishiki-chō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延暦儀式帳}} is a ritual text concerning the Inner Shrine, comprising one scroll and 23 articles.<ref name=";0">{{Cite |title=皇太神宮儀式帳とは - コトバンク|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/皇太神宮儀式帳-496433|accessdate=2021-08-16}}</ref> On {{ill|August 28, 804 (Enryaku 23)|ja|804th year 8月28日 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 28, 804 (Enryaku 23)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it was submitted to the Jingikan by Ōmiya-no-kami Ōnakatomi no Makiyo, Negi Arakida no Kimisei, and Ōuchibito Isobe no Kotsugusa.<ref name=";0"/> The text details the following: - Annual events and their outlines - Legends concerning the enshrinement of deities - Structure and style of the shrine precincts and halls - Details of ritual garments and sacred treasures - Sengū ceremonies - Roles and responsibilities of priests and shrine officials - Management of sacred lands, villages, and fields - Administration of associated shrines - Morning and evening offerings (Ōmikesai) - Offerings such as gifts (御調, nosaki) and sacred objects (幣帛)<ref name=";3"/><ref name=";0"/> == Tōyukegū Gishiki-chō == The {{ill|Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Tōyukegū Gishiki-chō|ja|止由気宮儀式帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōyukegū Gishiki-chō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延暦儀式帳}} is a ritual text concerning the Outer Shrine, comprising one scroll and 9 articles.<ref name=";1">{{Cite |title=止由気宮儀式帳|url=https://kokusho.nijl.ac.jp/biblio/100132885||page=4|accessdate=2021-08-16}}</ref> It was submitted to the Jingikan in 804 (Enryaku 23) by Negi Satsuki no Maro.<ref name=";2"/>. The text describes: - Rituals specific to the Outer Shrine - Structures and Sengū ceremonies - Origins of enshrinement - Administration of auxiliary and associated shrines - Responsibilities of shrine personnel - Morning and evening offerings<ref name=";3"/><ref name=";2">{{Cite |title=止由気宮儀式帳とは - コトバンク|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/止由気宮儀式帳-585137|accessdate=2021-08-16}}</ref> Unlike the {{ill|Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Kōtaijingū Gishiki-chō|ja|皇太神宮儀式帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtaijingū Gishiki-chō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延暦儀式帳}}, the {{ill|Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Enryaku Gishikichō|lt=Tōyukegū Gishiki-chō|ja|止由気宮儀式帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōyukegū Gishiki-chō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延暦儀式帳}} features a "Jingikan Verification" (神祇官検) seal at the end of the text.<ref name=";2"/> == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book |和書 |editor=[[Kokugakuin University]] Institute for Japanese Culture |title=〔縮刷版〕神道事典 |publisher=[[Kōbundō]] |date=1999 |isbn=978-4-335-16033-2 |ref=harv}} * {{Cite book |和書 |others=[[Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]] |title=神社のいろは 続 |publisher=[[Fusōsha]] |date=2013 |isbn=978-4-594-06764-9}} {{Shinto horizontal}}
{{translated page|ja|延暦儀式帳|version=99078817|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[zh:%E5%BB%B6%E5%8E%86%E4%BB%AA%E5%BC%8F%E5%B8%90]] [[ja:延暦儀式帳]]
<!--Enryaku Gishikichō--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:延历仪式帐]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh:延历仪式帐]] {{wikidata link|Q109596938}} [[Category:9th-century books]] [[Category:Heian-period books]] [[Category:Ise Shrine]] [[Category:Shinto texts]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
